description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a modular build. It is equipped with a collapsible stock for adjustable length, a prominent pistol grip, and a detachable curved magazine. The upper receiver sports a rail system with a mounted holographic sight for rapid target acquisition. The barrel is standard length and fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. Additional details include a textured handguard and visible fire selector, making it suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, curved magazine, rail-mounted holographic sight, and flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with flash hider and the alignment of the barrel and sight.
description_view_1: Side profile displaying the collapsible stock, pistol grip, curved magazine, handguard, and mounted holographic sight.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, grip, and the back of the sight system.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with more detail on the magazine and receiver.
